ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solar_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "data_cat" INTEGER /* Category of the data (e.g., Actual, Forecast) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "month_index" INTEGER /* Month index of the data entry */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week */,
  "day_of_year" INTEGER /* Day of the year */,
  "solar_exposure" REAL /* Daily global solar exposure in MJ/m*m */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the location where the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data on a scale */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_data_month_index FOREIGN KEY ("month_index") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_data_data_cat FOREIGN KEY ("data_cat") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default category for new data entries */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Month the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the file (e.g., creation date, author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES solar_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of the user's permissions */,
  "team" TEXT /* Research team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken (e.g., specific query parameters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES solar_data ("data_id")
)
